lede: A look at August 21 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Kenji Fan and Usain Bolt, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Solar eclipse of August 21, 2017
events.desc: A solar eclipse traverses the continental United States.

events.title: 1991 Soviet coup attempt
events.desc: Coup attempt against Mikhail Gorbachev collapses.

events.title: James Anderson Jr.
events.desc: James Anderson Jr. posthumously receives the first Medal of Honor to be awarded to an African American U.S. Marine.

events.title: Harry Daghlian
events.desc: Physicist Harry Daghlian is fatally irradiated in a criticality accident during an experiment with the Demon core at Los Alamos National Laboratory.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Guadalcanal campaign: American forces defeat an attack by Imperial Japanese Army soldiers in the Battle of the Tenaru.

events.title: Second Battle of the Somme
events.desc: World War I: The Second Battle of the Somme begins.

events.title: American Bar Association
events.desc: The American Bar Association is founded in Saratoga Springs, New York.

events.title: Charles XIV John
events.desc: Jean-Baptiste Bernadotte, Marshal of France, is elected Crown Prince of Sweden by the Swedish Riksdag of the Estates.

events.title: Ottoman–Venetian War (1714–1718)
events.desc: Seventh Ottoman–Venetian War: The arrival of naval reinforcements and the news of the Battle of Petrovaradin force the Ottomans to abandon the Siege of Corfu, thus preserving the Ionian Islands under Venetian rule.

events.title: Pueblo peoples
events.desc: Pueblo Indians capture Santa Fe from the Spanish during the Pueblo Revolt.

deaths.text: Nell McCafferty, Northern Irish journalist, playwright and civil rights campaigner
C. Gordon Fullerton, American colonel, engineer, and astronaut
Robert Moog, American businessman, founded Moog Music
Leon Trotsky, Russian theorist and politician, founded the Red Army
Charles Wyndham, 2nd Earl of Egremont, English politician, Secretary of State for the Southern Department

observances.text: Christian Feast Day: Abraham of Smolensk (Eastern Orthodox Church)
Christian Feast Day: Our Lady of Knock
